changeset.author: meridian
changeset.query: CREATE CONSTRAINT supplier_id IF NOT EXISTS FOR (s:Supplier) REQUIRE s.id IS UNIQUE
CREATE INDEX supplier_name IF NOT EXISTS FOR (s:Supplier) ON (s.name)
CREATE INDEX supplier_country IF NOT EXISTS FOR (s:Supplier) ON (s.country_iso)

changeset.author: meridian
changeset.query: CREATE CONSTRAINT port_id IF NOT EXISTS FOR (p:Port) REQUIRE p.id IS UNIQUE
CREATE CONSTRAINT port_locode IF NOT EXISTS FOR (p:Port) REQUIRE p.locode IS UNIQUE
CREATE INDEX port_name IF NOT EXISTS FOR (p:Port) ON (p.name)

changeset.author: meridian
changeset.query: CREATE CONSTRAINT chokepoint_id IF NOT EXISTS FOR (c:Chokepoint) REQUIRE c.id IS UNIQUE
CREATE INDEX chokepoint_name IF NOT EXISTS FOR (c:Chokepoint) ON (c.name)

changeset.author: meridian
changeset.query: CREATE CONSTRAINT region_id IF NOT EXISTS FOR (r:Region) REQUIRE r.id IS UNIQUE
CREATE INDEX region_country_iso IF NOT EXISTS FOR (r:Region) ON (r.country_iso)

changeset.author: meridian
changeset.query: CREATE CONSTRAINT route_id IF NOT EXISTS FOR (r:Route) REQUIRE r.id IS UNIQUE

changeset.author: meridian
changeset.query: CREATE CONSTRAINT carrier_id IF NOT EXISTS FOR (c:Carrier) REQUIRE c.id IS UNIQUE
CREATE INDEX carrier_name IF NOT EXISTS FOR (c:Carrier) ON (c.name)

changeset.author: meridian
changeset.query: CREATE CONSTRAINT sku_id IF NOT EXISTS FOR (s:SKU) REQUIRE s.id IS UNIQUE
CREATE INDEX sku_hs_code IF NOT EXISTS FOR (s:SKU) ON (s.hs_code)

changeset.author: meridian
changeset.query: CREATE INDEX located_in_rel IF NOT EXISTS FOR ()-[r:LOCATED_IN]-() ON (r.since)
CREATE INDEX ships_via_rel IF NOT EXISTS FOR ()-[r:SHIPS_VIA]-() ON (r.volume_pct)
CREATE INDEX on_route_rel IF NOT EXISTS FOR ()-[r:ON_ROUTE]-() ON (r.sequence)
